title: 3 x A4 XL Capacity Clip Bar Files Report Project Black Slide Binder Folders
features: 3 x Tiger brand NUS approved storage and presentation clip bar files
XL capacity, each holds up to 60 sheets of standard 80gsm unpunched paper. Thumb notch cut for easy opening
Gloss clear cover, large inner storage pocket and strong 500 micron professional matt back cover in black and dark blue (pre-assorted)
Ideal for business, household or student use
description: Ideal for presentations and projects, these clear files can hold up to 50 sheets of A4 paper with a black clipbar to secure the pages into place. They include a thumbnotch for easy use.Colour: ClearBlack clipbarThumbnotch for easy useHolds up to 50 A4 sheetsPack of 36 (12x3)
